<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `devtools::document()` run if any roxygen comments changed
- [ ] `devtools::test()` passes
- [ ] `devtools::check()` is 0 errors / 0 warnings (license NOTE only)
- [ ] `NEWS.md` has a bullet under the development-version heading, if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] `plans/DECISIONS.md` has a new row, if this PR settles a design decision
- [ ] `pkgdown::build_site()` rebuilt and `docs/` committed, if README/roxygen/vignettes changed
